title: Orbital
description: Reference scenarios and shared simulation resources.
author: orbital

items.title: Strait of Hormuz — Supply Chain Cascade
items.description: Agent-based commodity flow model. Set blockade intensity and watch energy prices, fertilizer shortages, crop yields, and food insecurity cascade naturally from the system structure.
items.author: orbital

items.title: World Events
items.description: Interactive globe showing georeferenced conflict events from GDELT, UCDP, and ACLED. Time slider steps through days.
items.author: orbital

items.title: IPCC AR6 — Global Warming Scenarios
items.description: Energy balance model driven by AR6 SSP CO₂ trajectories. Geographic temperature anomaly under four emissions pathways, 2024–2100.
items.author: orbital
